channel.title: AI Infra Curriculum
channel.description: A self-study audio series on the systems behind generative AI: the compute value chain layer by layer, the key players, the history, and where the constraints actually bind. Two co-hosts, one Australian and one American.
channel.itunes:author: Alfred B.
channel.itunes:summary: A self-study audio series on the systems behind generative AI: the compute value chain layer by layer, the key players, the history, and where the constraints actually bind. Two co-hosts, one Australian and one American.

item.title: Episode 1 — The AI Compute Value Chain
item.description: The reference map every later episode hangs on — fabless vs. foundry, the choke points, training vs. inference.
item.itunes:summary: The reference map every later episode hangs on — fabless vs. foundry, the choke points, training vs. inference.
item.itunes:author: Alfred B.

item.title: Episode 2 — Chip Fabrication & Equipment
item.description: Lithography and EUV, Zeiss optics and High-NA, masks and pellicles, gate-all-around and backside power, the WFE oligopoly, TSMC's yield moat, the challengers, and CoWoS packaging.
item.itunes:summary: Lithography and EUV, Zeiss optics and High-NA, masks and pellicles, gate-all-around and backside power, the WFE oligopoly, TSMC's yield moat, the challengers, and CoWoS packaging.
item.itunes:author: Alfred B.

item.title: Episode 3 — Accelerators, Memory & Networking
item.description: GPUs (Blackwell, Rubin) and AMD, the custom-silicon wave (TPU, Trainium, Maia, and the Broadcom/Marvell ASIC role), HBM and the memory wall, and the NVLink/InfiniBand/Ethernet fabric that fuses thousands of chips into one machine.
item.itunes:summary: GPUs (Blackwell, Rubin) and AMD, the custom-silicon wave (TPU, Trainium, Maia, and the Broadcom/Marvell ASIC role), HBM and the memory wall, and the NVLink/InfiniBand/Ethernet fabric that fuses thousands of chips into one machine.
item.itunes:author: Alfred B.

item.title: Episode 4 — AI Datacenters, Power & Cooling
item.description: The jump to one-hundred-thirty-kilowatt racks, the air-to-liquid-to-immersion cooling shift, the power and grid-interconnection bottleneck, the capex supercycle, and the colocation/leasing layer (Equinix, Digital Realty, Vantage, Crusoe) held apart from the cloud operators.
item.itunes:summary: The jump to one-hundred-thirty-kilowatt racks, the air-to-liquid-to-immersion cooling shift, the power and grid-interconnection bottleneck, the capex supercycle, and the colocation/leasing layer (Equinix, Digital Realty, Vantage, Crusoe) held apart from the cloud operators.
item.itunes:author: Alfred B.

item.title: Episode 5 — Industry Economics & Geopolitics
item.description: Nvidia's CUDA moat and its real cracks, where the gross margin actually sits, cloud vs neocloud economics and circular financing, training vs inference, model-lab burn, and the export-control / Taiwan / CHIPS-Act geopolitics.
item.itunes:summary: Nvidia's CUDA moat and its real cracks, where the gross margin actually sits, cloud vs neocloud economics and circular financing, training vs inference, model-lab burn, and the export-control / Taiwan / CHIPS-Act geopolitics.
item.itunes:author: Alfred B.

item.title: Antimetal — a startup teardown
item.description: Cloud cost and FinOps, the company's history, competitors, and the post-deployment automation bet.
item.itunes:summary: Cloud cost and FinOps, the company's history, competitors, and the post-deployment automation bet.
item.itunes:author: Alfred B.
